overall.description: A gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character driving a sports car through a dimly lit underground garage, then proceeding on foot through industrial loading docks and covered walkways before emerging onto a sunlit urban sidewalk. The clip transitions from enclosed artificial lighting to bright natural daylight with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking garage and service tunnel

events.description: sports car turns right and exits frame, camera transitions to walking on foot
approaching bright daylight at the end of the dark tunnel

agents.ego_description: driving a black sports car with red stripes through a concrete garage, then continuing on foot through a dark corridor toward the exit

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car with red racing stripes driving forward and turning right to exit the garage

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete support pillars lining the left side of the garage
metal roll-up door on the right wall of the garage
fluorescent tube lights hanging from the garage ceiling
stacked cardboard boxes and debris on the right side of the corridor
bright rectangular exit at the end of the dark tunnel showing daylight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit concrete garage where a black sports car with red stripes drives forward before turning right and exiting the frame. The perspective shifts to walking on foot through a dark corridor lined with concrete pillars and scattered cardboard boxes, approaching a bright exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered loading dock with overhead pedestrian walkways

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into bright semi-covered industrial loading area with skylights
worker in yellow safety vest becomes visible near parked utility truck

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered industrial loading dock with concrete walls on the left and industrial equipment on the right

notable_agents.action: yellow utility truck parked on the right side of the loading dock
worker wearing a yellow high-visibility safety vest standing near the parked truck

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian bridge with red trim spanning across the top of the corridor
smooth gray concrete retaining walls on the left side
large cylindrical ventilation pipes running along the right wall
glass skylights in the ceiling allowing natural sunlight to filter through
large industrial HVAC units and fans mounted on the right wall
stacked shipping containers and wooden pallets on the right side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark tunnel into a bright, semi-covered industrial loading dock with concrete walls and overhead walkways with red accents. Sunlight filters through skylights above as the camera passes a worker in a yellow vest standing near a parked yellow utility truck on the right, with industrial ventilation pipes and cargo containers visible along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor transitioning to city street

events.description: turning left at the intersection to follow the sidewalk ramp upward
moving from industrial corridor to urban street with large digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial corridor and turning left onto a city street with large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking up the sloped sidewalk ahead toward the city center

entered.detail: large metal industrial roll-up door at the end of the corridor
large digital billboards displaying the Delamain luxury vehicle brand on the building facade
modern street lamp with horizontal LED light fixture
red and white striped concrete traffic barrier blocking the road
concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the industrial corridor with ventilation units and scaffolding visible, the camera approaches an intersection and turns left. Large digital advertisements for 'Delamain' appear on the building walls, and a graffiti-covered wall becomes visible on the left as the scene opens up to reveal the futuristic city skyline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk ramp with graffiti art

events.description: graffiti-covered wall becomes prominent feature on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking up a sloped sidewalk ramp toward the distant futuristic city skyline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead up the ramp toward the city center

entered.detail: palm tree visible against the sky near the skyscrapers
modern street lamps lining the sidewalk ramp

segments.scene_description: Walking up a sunlit sidewalk ramp with a graffiti-covered concrete wall now prominent on the left side. The camera moves toward the distant futuristic skyline with towering glass skyscrapers, passing modern street lamps as a pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement from the oppressive shadows of an underground garage into the bright, airy expanse of an industrial loading dock. It begins in a dimly lit concrete space where a black sports car with red stripes drives forward and turns away, before the perspective shifts to a walk through a dark corridor lined with pillars and scattered cardboard boxes. As the camera advances toward a distant light, the scene opens from the tunnel into a semi-covered loading area where sunlight filters through overhead skylights. The environment then expands to reveal concrete walls and red-accented walkways, passing a worker in a yellow vest and a parked utility truck amidst a backdrop of ventilation pipes and cargo containers.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined industrial corridor that gradually opens into a bright, expansive urban landscape. It begins by navigating through a passage lined with ventilation units and scaffolding before turning left at an intersection. As the camera passes large digital advertisements for Delamain and a graffiti-covered wall, the enclosed space shifts to reveal a distant futuristic city skyline. The scene then transitions onto a sunlit sidewalk ramp, moving past modern street lamps and a pedestrian walking ahead. Finally, the perspective pushes forward toward towering glass skyscrapers under the clear light of day.
